final:
// // This module designs a 4-bit binary down-counter that decrements its value on each rising edge of the clock signal (CLK). The counter resets to zero when the reset signal (RST) is asserted. Once the counter reaches its minimum value of 0 (binary 0000), it wraps around to 15 on the next decrement.
module top_module(
    input CLK, RST,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (RST) begin
            Q <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else begin
            if (Q == 4'b1111) begin
                Q <= 4'b0000;
            end
            else begin
                Q <= Q + 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
